raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Simp,’ by Roshan Sethi
description: “The Simp,” by Roshan Sethi, is a satire of the unending demands, learned helplessness and stubborn racism of Hollywood elites.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Coast of Everything,’ by Guillermo Stitch
book_title: ‘The Coast of Everything,’ by Guillermo Stitch
description: “The Coast of Everything,” by Guillermo Stitch, is structured like a nesting doll, with one story hidden within another.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Men in Love,’ by Irvine Welsh
description: Irvine Welsh brings back his beloved Edinburgh ensemble for his new novel, “Men in Love.”
